acolyte.name: Acolyte
acolyte.background_hook: You have spent your life in service of a temple, learning its rites and dogma.
acolyte.equipment_note: Holy symbol, prayer book, incense, vestments

criminal.name: Criminal
criminal.background_hook: You once worked as a hired muscle or thief in an underground organization.
criminal.equipment_note: Crowbar, dark common clothes, belt pouch

entertainer.name: Entertainer
entertainer.background_hook: You have performed before audiences ranging from street corners to noble courts.

folk_hero.name: Folk Hero
folk_hero.background_hook: You come from a humble social rank, but you are destined for so much more.
folk_hero.equipment_note: Craftsman's tools, shovel, iron pot, common clothes

noble.name: Noble
noble.background_hook: You were born into wealth and privilege, though you have chosen an unusual path.
noble.equipment_note: Fine clothes, signet ring, scroll of pedigree, purse

sage.name: Sage
sage.background_hook: You spent years learning the lore of the multiverse in academic institutions.
sage.equipment_note: Ink, quill, small knife, notebook, common clothes

soldier.name: Soldier
soldier.background_hook: War has been your life since you were old enough to hold a blade.
soldier.equipment_note: Insignia of rank, trophy from a fallen enemy, dice set, common clothes
